results.name: damage increaser
results.description: Things deal +N damage. See also [damage multiplier](/tags/card/damage-multiplier).

results.name: damage multiplier
results.description: Things deal double or triple damage. See also [damage increaser](/tags/card/damage-increaser).

results.name: damage stays
results.description: Cards that prevent damage from being removed from one or more creatures during cleanup steps.

results.name: dandelion
results.description: Both the yellow petal form and the seed dispersing wisp form

results.name: danny pink
results.description: A former soldier who teaches mathematics at Coal Hill School.

results.name: dappled
results.description: Light coming from spotted patches, usually foliage

results.name: darien
results.description: King Darien the Great, also known as Darien the Good. Not to be confused with [King Darien XLVIII](darien-xlviii).

results.name: darien xlviii
results.description: King Darien XLVIII, not to be confused with [Darien](darien).

results.name: darigaaz
results.description: Aka Rhammidarigaaz, one of the five Primevals.

results.name: darillium
results.description: A planet featured prominently in the Doctor Who episode "The Husbands of River Song"

results.name: dark-dweller goblin
results.description: Goblins who live underground on Zendikar, notable for their lack of eyes.

results.name: dastardly doom symbol
results.description: The symbol of the league of dastardly doom: the light bulb with an explosion.

results.name: daunt
results.description: The "can't be blocked by power 2 or less" as named by WotC. See also [gives daunt](gives-daunt).

results.name: day/night
results.description: Effects that make use of or interact with the Day/Night mechanic introduced in Innistrad: Midnight Hunt, including but not limited to cards with the Daybound and Nightbound keywords.

results.name: day zero errata
results.description: These cards received errata before or immediately after their initial release.

results.name: deadpool (hero icon)
results.description: It's me, Deadpool. Just kidding, it's my wonderful icon!

results.name: dead tree
results.description: Trees with no leaves on them.

results.name: déagol
results.description: Sméagol's late brother.

results.name: deal with the devil
results.description: Black enchantments that come with a major drawback that could doom you. See also [Lich effect](/tags/card/lich-effect)

results.name: deanimate
results.description: Uncreaturize a creature. For creatures that deanimate themselves, see [deanimate self](deanimate-self).

results.name: deanimate self
results.description: Creatures that can stop being creatures. For noncreatures that may become creatures, see [animate self](animate-self).

results.name: death dealer
results.description: A character created by Frank Frazetta. Death Dealer has appeared across numerous paintings as well as spin-off material such as comic books and TTRPG supplements.

results.name: deathtouch to planeswalkers
results.description: Abilities that destroy planeswalkers that receive damage.

results.name: death trigger
results.description: Abilities that trigger from permanents being sent to a graveyard.

results.name: death trigger opponent
results.description: Cards that trigger when an opponent's permanent is sent to a graveyard.

results.name: death trigger-self
results.description: Permanents with abilities that trigger when they die.
